continuation_rule.description: Allows offensive players to finish steps/pivots after contact if dribble is gathered.
continuation_rule.logic_adjustment: Increases expected field goal percentage for driving teams; slight boost to offensive efficiency in high-contact matchups.

orb_density.description: High offensive rebounding rates as a volatility buffer.
orb_density.logic_adjustment: Teams with ORB% > 35% receive a 'Second Chance' multiplier in simulation loops.

luck_regression.logic: Teams with extreme positive luck (> 0.05) are penalized in early rounds; teams with negative luck (< -0.05) receive a 'Grit' boost if defensive efficiency is top 30.

underseed_vulnerability.impact: Increases upset probability by 15% if opponent is high-Moxie.
